The '''''Spritespray''''' was a medium cruiser in service to the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] during the latter half of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. It was part of a [[Alpha Fleet|task force]] commanded by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] during the [[Battle of Bilbringi (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Bilbringi]]. It was one of the six warships that survived the engagement.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''
